data.description: You can anchor yourself to an anchoring point and climb as if you were using climbing equipment; you can't climb more than 25 feet away from your anchored position. To undo the anchor, you must be within 10 feet of it.
backpack, a bedroll, a change of clothes, 5 candles, 5 days of rations, a waterskin, and a kil.
